languages.text: "Несомненно! Восстановление реликварного археотеха есть священная и нерушимая обязанность любого служителя Бога-Машины. Но прежде сего действия я инициирую новую итерацию воззвания к Вольному Торговцу с мольбой: какова судьба Чудотворного Реактора Синтеза?" {n}Логис повторяет слова с той же экзальтированной интонацией, что и в предыдущий раз.{/n}

"Undoubtedly! The restoration of reliquary archeotech is a sacred and inviolable duty of any servant of the Machine God. But before this action, I initiate a new iteration of an appeal to the Rogue Trader: what is the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor?" {n}The Logis repeats the words with the same tone of exaltation as before.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Несомненно! Восстановление реликварного археотеха есть священная и нерушимая обязанность любого служителя Бога-Машины. Но прежде сего действия я инициирую новую итерацию воззвания к Вольному Торговцу с мольбой: какова судьба Чудотворного Реактора Синтеза?" {n}Логис повторяет слова с той же экзальтированной интонацией, что и в предыдущий раз.{/n}

But before this action, I initiate a new iteration of an appeal to the Rogue Trader: what is the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor?" {n}The Logis repeats the words with the same tone of exaltation as before.{/n}

languages.text: “当然！修复圣物级远古科技，乃是每一位万机之神的仆从不可违背的神圣职责。但在此项工作之前，我要再次请教行商浪人：那神赐聚变反应堆最终将作何处置？”{n}那逻辑士再次重复了这句话，语调一如之前那般激昂。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Undoubtedly! The restoration of reliquary archeotech is a sacred and inviolable duty of any servant of the Machine God. But before this action, I initiate a new iteration of an appeal to the Rogue Trader: what is the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor?" {n}The Logis repeats the words with the same tone of exaltation as before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “当然！修复圣物级远古科技，乃是每一位万机之神的仆从不可违背的神圣职责。但在此项工作之前，我要再次请教行商浪人：那神赐聚变反应堆最终将作何处置？”{n}那逻辑士再次重复了这句话，语调一如之前那般激昂。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Sin duda! La restauración de la arqueotecnología del relicario es el deber sagrado e inviolable de todo sirviente del Dios Máquina, pero, antes de esta acción, inicio una repetición de mi solicitud a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente: ¿cuál ha sido el destino del milagroso reactor de fusión?». {n}El Logos repite las palabras con el mismo tono de exaltación de antes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Undoubtedly! The restoration of reliquary archeotech is a sacred and inviolable duty of any servant of the Machine God. But before this action, I initiate a new iteration of an appeal to the Rogue Trader: what is the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor?" {n}The Logis repeats the words with the same tone of exaltation as before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Sin duda! La restauración de la arqueotecnología del relicario es el deber sagrado e inviolable de todo sirviente del Dios Máquina, pero, antes de esta acción, inicio una repetición de mi solicitud a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente: ¿cuál ha sido el destino del milagroso reactor de fusión?». {n}El Logos repite las palabras con el mismo tono de exaltación de antes.{/n}

languages.text: « Sans aucun doute ! La restauration des reliques archéotechnologiques est un devoir sacré et inviolable pour tous les serviteurs du Dieu-Machine. Mais avant, je formule une nouvelle fois ma requête {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} : qu'est-il advenu du réacteur à fusion miraculeux ? » {n}Le logis réitère sa demande sur le même ton exalté qu'auparavant.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Undoubtedly! The restoration of reliquary archeotech is a sacred and inviolable duty of any servant of the Machine God. But before this action, I initiate a new iteration of an appeal to the Rogue Trader: what is the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor?" {n}The Logis repeats the words with the same tone of exaltation as before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Sans aucun doute ! La restauration des reliques archéotechnologiques est un devoir sacré et inviolable pour tous les serviteurs du Dieu-Machine. Mais avant, je formule une nouvelle fois ma requête {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} : qu'est-il advenu du réacteur à fusion miraculeux ? » {n}Le logis réitère sa demande sur le même ton exalté qu'auparavant.{/n}

languages.text: "Şüphesiz! Kutsal emanet arkeotekinin restorasyonu, Makine Tanrı'nın hizmetkârlarının kutsal ve ihlal edilemez vazifesidir. Ancak bu eylemden önce Hür Tacir'e yapılan çağrıyı bir kez daha yineliyorum: Mucizevi Füzyon Reaktörü'nün akıbeti nedir?" {n}Logis, sözcükleri bir öncekiyle aynı coşkulu tonda tekrarlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Undoubtedly! The restoration of reliquary archeotech is a sacred and inviolable duty of any servant of the Machine God. But before this action, I initiate a new iteration of an appeal to the Rogue Trader: what is the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor?" {n}The Logis repeats the words with the same tone of exaltation as before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Şüphesiz! Kutsal emanet arkeotekinin restorasyonu, Makine Tanrı'nın hizmetkârlarının kutsal ve ihlal edilemez vazifesidir. Ancak bu eylemden önce Hür Tacir'e yapılan çağrıyı bir kez daha yineliyorum: Mucizevi Füzyon Reaktörü'nün akıbeti nedir?" {n}Logis, sözcükleri bir öncekiyle aynı coşkulu tonda tekrarlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Gewiss! Die Wiederherstellung reliquiarer Archäotech ist eine heilige und unausweichliche Pflicht aller Diener des Maschinengottes. Vorher muss ich allerdings eine neue Iteration einer Anfrage an {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} richten: Was ist aus dem Wundersamen Fusionsreaktor geworden?" {n}Der Logis wiederholt die Worte mit gleichbleibender Überheblichkeit.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Undoubtedly! The restoration of reliquary archeotech is a sacred and inviolable duty of any servant of the Machine God. But before this action, I initiate a new iteration of an appeal to the Rogue Trader: what is the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor?" {n}The Logis repeats the words with the same tone of exaltation as before.{/n}

Vorher muss ich allerdings eine neue Iteration einer Anfrage an {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} richten: Was ist aus dem Wundersamen Fusionsreaktor geworden?" {n}Der Logis wiederholt die Worte mit gleichbleibender Überheblichkeit.{/n}

languages.text: 「疑う余地なし！聖遺物アーケテクの修復は機械神に仕える者にとって神聖で侵すことのできない義務である。だがこの行為の前に、私は新たな試みでローグ・トレーダーに訴えかける。奇跡の融合炉の運命は？」{n}ログリスは同じ熱狂的な口調で言葉を繰り返す。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Undoubtedly! The restoration of reliquary archeotech is a sacred and inviolable duty of any servant of the Machine God. But before this action, I initiate a new iteration of an appeal to the Rogue Trader: what is the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor?" {n}The Logis repeats the words with the same tone of exaltation as before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「疑う余地なし！聖遺物アーケテクの修復は機械神に仕える者にとって神聖で侵すことのできない義務である。だがこの行為の前に、私は新たな試みでローグ・トレーダーに訴えかける。奇跡の融合炉の運命は？」{n}ログリスは同じ熱狂的な口調で言葉を繰り返す。{/n}
